nasb.text: If you forsake the Lord and serve foreign gods, then He will turn and do you harm and consume you after He has done good to you.”

esv.text: If you forsake the Lord and serve foreign gods, then he will turn and do you harm and consume you, after having done you good.”

cnv.text: 如果你們離棄耶和華，去事奉外族人的神，那麼在耶和華賜福給你們之後，他必轉而降禍與你們，把你們消滅。”

ccb.text: 如果你们背弃耶和华，去拜外族的神明，尽管祂曾经恩待你们，也必降祸给你们，毁灭你们。”
